'''Wink Tasion''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked for the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos Resistance]] movement as a communications technician. He was a teacher at the [[University of Garos]] and a good friend of [[Alexandra Winger]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Whispers in the Dark|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
*{{JournalCite|6|Rendezvous with Destiny|reprint=1}}
